reason: named 'replication lag' (stale-read) at event 4, before first successful runtime probe at event 11
first_probe_cmd:
acct="acct-test-$RANDOM"
# create account
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "INSERT INTO accounts (id, balance_cents) VALUES ('$acct', 100) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET balance_cents=100;" 2>&1 | tail -1
sleep 1
echo "deposit:"
curl -s -X POST "$API_URL/deposit" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"account\":\"$acct\",\"amount_cents\":50}"
echo
echo "immediate balance:"
curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=$acct"
echo
sleep 1
echo "balance after 1s (pin expired):"
curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=$acct"
echo
